title: Biome Dirt
description: Give your Minecraft landscape a little zhuzh with biome specific dirt colors! This resource pack adds a custom colormap to dirt blocks which tunes their colors to match the biome they're in. Mod that supports grid colormaps (Polytone/Optifine) required.
body:
Give your Minecraft landscape a little zhuzh with biome specific dirt colors! This resource pack adds a custom colormap to dirt blocks which tunes their colors to match the biome they're in. Mod that supports grid colormaps (Polytone/Optifine) required. Colors dirt, paths, podzol, farmland, coarse dirt, rooted dirt and mycelium!

Please reach out with any issues/question/comments/feedback/screenshots or anything else! [Github (automatoney/biome-dirt)](https://github.com/automatoney/biome-dirt/issues) is the best place to contact me.
